|affiliation=[[Groogrun]]<ref name="Clan">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' identifies [[Ortugg]] as a member of the [[Groogrun]]. In "[[Ortugg's Letter Home]]," Ortugg writes to [[Venorra]], a member of his clan that sold his contract to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. As such, Venorra must also be a member of the Groogrun clan.</ref>

'''Venorra''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]]<ref name="Letter" /> and a member of the [[Groogrun]] clan.<ref name="Clan" /> Venorra sold Ortugg into [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] service.<ref name="Letter" />
